dbbot v0.8.0-beta.2 fixes the MySQL 9.7 package resolution path used during InnoDB Cluster preparation and restores the secure default-password guard for public lab credentials.

This beta makes the pre-download path for MySQL Shell follow the same version-aware package naming logic as the setup role, so MySQL 9.7 now resolves the published glibc2.28 shell artifact instead of the older glibc2.17 path.

It also restores the secure default for `fcs_allow_dbbot_default_passwd` to `false`, so public default passwords are blocked unless the operator explicitly opts in for lab-only validation.
